question: Show the customers with total quantity of order bigger than 1.
sql: SELECT customer.Customer_ID, customer.Name, SUM(customer_order.Quantity) AS Total_Quantity FROM customer JOIN customer_order ON customer.Customer_ID = customer_order.Customer_ID GROUP BY customer.Customer_ID HAVING SUM(customer_order.Quantity) > 1;

back_translation.intent: 查询满足特定条件的客户及其总订购量
filters: customer.Customer_ID IN (1, Arthur Morris, Denis Compton, Donald Bradman, Cyril Washbrook, Len Hutton)
customer_order.Dish_Name IN (Spring Rolls, Kung Pao Chicken, Ma Po Tofu, Peking Roasted Duck)

semantic.reason: filters中错误地添加了customer表的Customer_ID和customer_order表的Dish_Name条件，而原始问题仅要求总订购量大于1的客户，未涉及具体客户ID或菜品名称的过滤
